events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the recovery plan is **rejected (fail, high risk)**. It proposes starting Framing (D) before the Slab cure (CC) lag finishes — a hatched, explicitly non-compressible hard constraint in the schedule legend. Loading a slab before cure completes risks structural damage and isn't a valid way to recover the 1-day slip; recovery time must be found elsewhere, and all inspection holds (I, K, Q) must remain intact.
